prompt: An outdoor weatherproof enclosure with a gasketed front door hung on two heavy-duty welded hinge knuckles, a multi-point locking bar mechanism engaged by a central recessed handle, a neoprene gasket groove around the door perimeter, and a padlock hasp at the right edge.
